name: Cookies Made from Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir well.
2. Using a spoon, drop spoonfuls of the batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and let cool.
